entry.title: Top 10 Deepfake Detection Tools for Enterprise Security in 2026
entry.summary: A ranked comparison of the 10 best deepfake detection tools for enterprises in 2026, judged on independent benchmarks, real-time capability, and provenance.

entry.title: Multimodal Biometric Authentication: Future Trends, Risks, And Security Applications
entry.summary: Explore multimodal biometric authentication for fraud, identity, and contact center teams using AI, liveness detection, deepfake detection, and layered verification.

entry.title: The Deepfake Watchlist: Week of July 10-16, 2026
entry.summary: The Deepfake Watchlist is Resemble AI's weekly surveillance of synthetic media incidents, ongoing cases, and disputed content shaping the news cycle. Each week we track confirmed incidents, emerging attack vectors, and claims under investigation, alongside the provenance, detection, and policy threads running underneath them.

entry.title: The Watermark Can't Be Optional Anymore. So We Made It the Default
entry.summary: Resemble AI's Q2 in review: PerTh Multimodal extends watermarking to video, image and text for the EU AI Act, plus first-place audio deepfake detection.

entry.title: Why Deepfake Detection Is Critical for Remote Onboarding
entry.summary: Discover how deepfake detection for remote onboarding strengthens identity verification, reduces fraud risks, and improves trust in virtual hiring processes.

entry.title: Where Neural Audio Watermarking Fits In Audio Security
entry.summary: Learn how neural audio watermarking traces AI-generated voices, where it holds up under real distribution, and what your compliance workflow actually needs

entry.title: The Deepfake Watchlist: Week of July 3-9, 2026
entry.summary: The Deepfake Watchlist is Resemble AI's weekly surveillance of synthetic media incidents, ongoing cases, and disputed content shaping the news cycle. Each week we track confirmed incidents, emerging attack vectors, and claims under investigation, alongside the provenance, detection, and policy threads running underneath them.

entry.title: Real-Time Liveness Detection Solutions for Deepfake Fraud
entry.summary: Face liveness won't stop a cloned voice from bypassing your IVR. See how real-time liveness detection solutions address deepfake fraud across both channels.

entry.title: The Deepfake Detection Guide (Deepfake 101): Threat Vectors and Four Defense Layers
entry.summary: Deepfakes now cost businesses millions. Learn what they are, where they strike, why your stack misses them, and the four layers of defense every company needs. This practical guide to deepfakes for security and fraud teams breaks down core concepts, how AI deepfakes are built and how to detect deepfakes with and without automation.

entry.title: Chatterbox Nano and Flash: Speed at the edge, throughput at scale
entry.summary: Meet the fraternal twins of TTS. Chatterbox Nano is 110M parameters built for the edge. Chatterbox Flash is diffusion-LLM architecture built for scale. Both open source, both watermarked by default from Resemble AI.

entry.title: DETECT-3B-Omni is Agnostic of Content and Demographics
entry.summary: A large-scale study showing that Resemble's audio deepfake detector reaches the same accuracy no matter what's being said or who's speaking, a requirement for GDPR-compliant call monitoring.

entry.title: The Deepfake Watchlist: Week of June 26 – July 2, 2026
entry.summary: The Deepfake Watchlist is Resemble AI's weekly surveillance of synthetic media incidents, ongoing cases, and disputed content shaping the news cycle. Each week we track confirmed incidents, emerging attack vectors, and claims under investigation, alongside the provenance, detection, and policy threads running underneath them.
